sections.paragraph:
πιπράσκω, πράω - pipraskō praō - pip-ras'-ko, prah'-o

The first is a reduplicated and prolonged form of the second (which occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses); contracted from περάω peraō (to traverse; from the base of G4008); to traffic (by travelling), that is, dispose of as merchandise or into slavery (literally or figuratively): - sell.
